rationale: The citing paper’s core constructs and studies focus on vice purchasing, symbolic vs. physical product presentation, vividness, and instant-gratification mechanisms, while the cited paper focuses on optimizing customized price promotions and profit across channels. Given this topical mismatch and the absence of any evidence of method/mechanism reuse (only a bare DOI match with no contextual quote), this looks like a likely background citation about general online–offline differences rather than substantive use.
